participant_id.Description: The unique participant identifier of the form sub-<label>, matching a participant entity found in the dataset

age.Description: Age of the participant at the time of the acquired session

IUS.Description: the score of Intolerance of Uncertainty Scale

CTQ.Description: the score of Childhood Trauma Questionnaire

IRI.Description: the score of Interpersonal Reactivity Index

IAT.Description: the score of Internet Addiction Test

FOMO.Description: the score of Fear of Missing Out Scale

LSASfear.Description: the score of Liebowitz social anxiety subscale: which primarily describes an individual's fearful responses to specific social or performance situations

LSASavoid.Description: the score of Liebowitz social anxiety subscale: which primarily describes an individual's avoidance frequency to specific social or performance situations

BDI.Description: the score of Beck Depression Inventory

AQ.Description: the score of the Autism-Spectrum Quotient

SAI.Description: the score of the State-Trait Anxiety Inventory subscale: which primarily describes an  individual's state-level anxiety

TAI.Description: the score of the State-Trait Anxiety Inventory subscale: which primarily describes an  individual's trait-level anxiety

ACC_Gc_SD.Description: the accuracy rate of global congruent trials within social distraction conditions

RT_Gc_SD.Description: the Reaction time of global congruent trials within social distraction conditions

ACC_Gic_SD.Description: the accuracy rate of global incongruent trials within social distraction conditions

RT_Gic_SD.Description: the Reaction time of global incongruent trials within social distraction conditions

ACC_Lc_SD.Description: the accuracy rate of local congruent trials within social distraction conditions

RT_Lc_SD.Description: the Reaction time of local congruent trials within social distraction conditions

ACC_Lic_SD.Description: the accuracy rate of local incongruent trials within social distraction conditions

RT_Lic_SD.Description: the Reaction time of local incongruent trials within social distraction conditions

ACC_Gc_BL.Description: the accuracy rate of global congruent trials within baseline conditions

RT_Gc_BL.Description: the Reaction time of global congruent trials within baseline conditions

ACC_Gic_BL.Description: the accuracy rate of global incongruent trials within baseline conditions

RT_Gic_BL.Description: the Reaction time of global incongruent trials within baseline conditions

ACC_Lc_BL.Description: the accuracy rate of local congruent trials within baseline conditions

RT_Lc_BL.Description: the Reaction time of local congruent trials within baseline conditions

ACC_Lic_BL.Description: the accuracy rate of local incongruent trials within baseline conditions

RT_Lic_BL.Description: the Reaction time of local incongruent trials within baseline conditions

ACC_Gc_NSD.Description: the accuracy rate of global congruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions

RT_Gc_NSD.Description: the Reaction time of global congruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions

ACC_Gic_NSD.Description: the accuracy rate of global incongruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions

RT_Gic_NSD.Description: the Reaction time of global incongruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions

ACC_Lc_NSD.Description: the accuracy rate of local congruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions

RT_Lc_NSD.Description: the Reaction time of local congruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions

ACC_Lic_NSD.Description: the accuracy rate of local incongruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions

RT_Lic_NSD.Description: the Reaction time of local incongruent trials within Nonsocial distraction conditions
